ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of iron per specified unit */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the data */,
  "climatic" INTEGER /* Climatic conditions affecting production (1 for adverse, 0 for favorable) */,
  "iron_prod" REAL /* Iron production volume recorded on the date */,
  "iron_metallics" REAL /* Volume of metallic iron produced */,
  "shipments" REAL /* Volume of shipments made on the date */,
  "reserve_crudeore" REAL /* Reserve quantity of crude ore available */,
  "reserve_ironcontent" REAL /* Total iron content stored in reserves */,
  "demand" REAL /* Demand forecast for iron on the date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the production metrics entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the production plant */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the shift */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the operator */,
  "iron_prod" REAL /* Volume of iron produced on the date */,
  "iron_metallics" REAL /* Volume of metallic iron produced */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Production efficiency measured as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_metrics_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "climatic_data" (
  "climatic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climatic data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the climatic data entry */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the weather station */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature on the date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity on the date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded on the date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climatic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climatic_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the shipping carrier */,
  "volume_shipped" REAL /* Volume of iron shipped on the date */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the shipment */,
  "shipment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipment */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Actual arrival date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "reserves" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reserve entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reserve data entry */,
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the mine */,
  "reserve_crudeore" REAL /* Reserve quantity of crude ore available */,
  "reserve_ironcontent" REAL /* Total iron content stored in reserves */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the crude ore */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reserves_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the demand forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the predictive model */,
  "demand" REAL /* Forecasted demand for iron on the date */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the production plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production plant */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "shift_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mines" (
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mine */,
  "mine_name" TEXT /* Name of the mine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mine */,
  "ore_type" TEXT /* Type of ore mined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
